description: Convert the existing standard WordPress installation at /var/www/html/wordpress/ into a Sub-directory Multisite Network and provision a new departmental sub-site. The new sub-site must use the Site Address (URL path) 'biology', Site Title 'Biology Department', and Admin Email 'admin@example.com'. Ensure all configuration files and database settings are correctly updated to support a fully functioning sub-directory multisite network and verify the new site is accessible.
